title: [codereview-P4] Test uses str(metrics) check instead of proper attribute access
description: The metrics validation uses string check for 'collisions'. Should use proper API from Metrics class (see simulation.py:176). Update to metrics.collision_count > 0 or similar after verifying structure. This is polish but follows thorough codereview. test_scale.py:400
close_reason: Fixed with direct metrics.collisions and collision_rate properties from Metrics class. 3 clean codereview passes achieved with no remaining P0-P2 findings in test_scale.py. Main bead project-LICHEN-ev77 now eligible for close after verification.
